description.unified: Deals ATK M.DMG 7times to nearby enemies within a circular area, then deals ATK M.DMG to enemies in a frontal area and inflicts Down for 1.5sec [1.8 sec->1.5sec].

Deals ATK M.DMG to all enemies and inflicts Stun for 0.5sec [1.2 sec->0.5sec]. Upon casting, enters [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for 10sec, increasing ATK SPD by 35% [300->35%]. While active, releases a shockwave every 1.3sec [1.4 sec->1.3sec], dealing ATK M.DMG to nearby enemies. [(removed) stunning them for 0.6 sec]

Summons an Arcane Crystal, dealing ATK M.DMG to enemies in a frontal line, then causes an explosion that deals additional M.DMG. Enemies hit are inflicted with [Arcane Crystal Curse] for 5sec, and when Kirze attacks enemies under [Arcane Crystal Curse], applies stacks of [Arcane Crystal Energy]. [Arcane Crystal Curse]: Reduces ATK SPD by 10% [200->10%], and after 5sec, deals ATK M.DMG + 43% of ATK M.DMG per stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy], then resets all stacks.
Changes base Mana Recovery per sec to 150, increases Crit Chance by 250 [200->250], and increases the duration of CCs that all allies inflict on Bosses by 15% [30%->15%].

II.unified: Increases Crit Chance by 50. [(removed) Increases ATK Boost by 10%.]

III.unified: Increases Crit Chance by 75. [(removed) Increases ATK Boost by 15%.]

IV.unified: Increases Crit Chance by 125. [(removed) Increases ATK Boost by 25%.]

dark.unified: Each use increases DMG by 15%. This effect can stack up to 10 times. [(removed) If there is only 1 enemy, DMG is increased by 100%.]

light.unified: Increases Mana Cost by 1000 but increases duration by 4 sec. [(removed) reduces Cooldown by 6 sec.]

dark.unified: Increases ATK SPD by an additional 35%. [(removed) While under [Arcane Crystal Awakening], damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by 20%.]

light.unified: [Arcane Crystal Curse] additionally reduces ATK SPD by 10%. [(removed) Increases Mana Cost by 1000 and reduces Cooldown by 6 sec.]
At the start of battle, increases damage dealt to non-hero enemies by 65% [25%->65%] for 10 sec [20 sec->10 sec].

description.unified: [Slash, Blade of Judgment! ] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Mana Cost by 1000 [1->1000].
[Disperse, Crystal Haze!] Increases ATK SPD of all allies by 10% [an additional {0}->10%] and increases DEF Penetration of all allies by {0} [250->{0}].
[Bloom, Crimson Flower!] Increases DMG by {0}% [40%->{0}%], and gains 1 additional stack [3 additional stacks with {0}% chance->1 additional stack] when [Arcane Crystal Energy] is stacked.
[End to Evil Deeds!] Increases Crit DMG by (added) 32%, and changes the CC duration increase effect to {0}% [(removed) Increases Crit Chance by an additional 250].

dark.unified: Increases Crit DMG by 30% [40%->30%] and DEF Penetration by 150. This effect increases by 2 times after Kirze attacks the enemy 100 times.
